text.operational_en: Choose the longer scenic route with more exposed sections.
Choose the shorter protected route with less exposure and a better way out.

uncertainty.operational_en: The protective alarm and action direction are clear; the precise alarm level remains open.

text.operational_en: Thinking about exposed sections brings strong bodily tension of protection tied to a spatial boundary.
A protected route with a retreat option reduces the alarm.
There is a clear impulse toward a less exposed, lower-risk direction with a better retreat option.
